channel.title: recurrent on Kevin McKee
channel.description: Recent content in recurrent on Kevin McKee

item.title: Binary neural nets in R, part 3: Recurrent Helmholtz Machine
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: github repository for this project Part 3 of my neural network project in R involves coding a recurrent version of the Helmholtz machine. A recurrent (i.e., autoregressive or time-lagged) version of the network follows naturally (kind of), and of course, Hinton already published the idea in 1995. I used his paper as a guide to be sure nothing was markedly different about the approach and coded it according to my previous strategy.
